Area of Research

The project, funded by TÜBİTAK 1001 program,  aims to generate applied and theoretical knowledge about VR practices, employing multidisciplinary theoretical and methodological frameworks. As audience research, deploying theoretical and methodological frameworks that have emerged from the interaction of cognitive cinema theory with psychology will examine how perceptive experience is shaped by attention mechanisms in VR.
